description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a two-story structure, surrounded by a lush green lawn and enclosed by a low wall. The front facade includes a driveway with a carport, a decorative gate, and a landscaped entryway with palm trees. The backyard boasts a spacious wooden deck, an outdoor dining area, a swimming pool with a poolside pergola, and additional seating areas. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the indoor and outdoor spaces. The exterior is finished in a combination of light gray, white, and muted blue panels, with wooden accents on the deck and fencing. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a seamless integration with the surrounding garden.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a pool, wooden deck, and landscaped garden enclosed by a low wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, carport, decorative gate, and main entrance with palm trees and a clear view of the pool and deck.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard wooden deck, outdoor dining area, and the pool with a pergola, as well as the expansive lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with large windows, the open lawn, and the pool area extending along the side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the solid wall, upper story, and the green lawn with palm trees, with less visibility of the pool and deck.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
